ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code assigned to the course */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the course type */,
  "internal_enrollment" INTEGER /* Number of internal students enrolled */,
  "external_enrollment" INTEGER /* Number of external students enrolled */,
  "back_paper" TEXT /* Back paper status */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Credit hours associated with the course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the course was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the course was last updated */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the department offering the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES course_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for department inquiries */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name of the head of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course in which the student is enrolled */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolled in the course */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the course */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., active, completed, dropped) */,
  "drop_date" TEXT /* Date the student dropped the course (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the enrollment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the enrollment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "enrollment_year" INTEGER /* Year when the student enrolled in the university */,
  "program" TEXT /* Program the student is enrolled in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the student was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the student was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prerequisites" (
  "prerequisite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prerequisite record */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course that has prerequisites */,
  "prerequisite_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course that is a prerequisite */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prerequisite was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prerequisite was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prerequisite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prerequisites_prerequisite_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("prerequisite_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the course type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the course type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the course type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_credits" (
  "credit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit entry */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course associated with the credit hours */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Credit hours assigned to the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the credit hours were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the credit hours were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("credit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_credits_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_enrollment_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment stat record */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course for which enrollment stats are recorded */,
  "internal_enrollment" INTEGER /* Number of internal students enrolled */,
  "external_enrollment" INTEGER /* Number of external students enrolled */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the enrollment stats were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the enrollment stats were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_enrollment_stats_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "corequisites" (
  "corequisite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each corequisite record */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course that has corequisites */,
  "corequisite_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course that is a corequisite */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the corequisite was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the corequisite was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("corequisite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_corequisites_corequisite_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("corequisite_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_corequisites_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course evaluation */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being evaluated */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who evaluated the course */,
  "evaluation" TEXT /* Evaluation of the course by the student */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the course evaluation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the course evaluation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_evaluations_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_evaluations_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty member */,
  "faculty_name" TEXT /* Name of the faculty member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the faculty member */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the faculty member belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the faculty member was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the faculty member was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor record */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course being taught */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty member teaching the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instructor record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the instructor record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_instructors_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculty ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_instructors_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being assigned a role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role being assigned */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role assignment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
